title: Guidance for Providing and Using Administrative Data for Statistical Purposes
scope: GIA administrative data use for infrastructure statistics and analysis
description: Establishes principles for sharing administrative data across federal agencies for statistical research while protecting privacy

principles.title: Purpose Limitation
principles.description: Administrative data can only be used for explicitly authorized statistical purposes

principles.title: Privacy Protection
principles.description: Statistical and operational uses must be strictly separated

principles.title: Data Security
principles.description: Administrative data must be protected from unauthorized access

principles.title: Interagency Cooperation
principles.description: Data sharing agreements required between agencies

principles.title: Transparency
principles.description: Document all data flows and uses

controls.description: Block operational use of data designated statistical-only
